articles.title: When is the China quarterly GDP and how could it affect AUD/USD?
articles.expand: The National Bureau of Statistics of China (NBS) will publish its data at 02.00 GMT on Thursday. China quarterly GDP is estimated to grow 1.3% in the first quarter (Q1), compared to an expansion of 1.2% in Q4. On an annual basis, the Chinese economy is forecast to expand 4.8% versus 4.5% prior.
